overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a dirt path through a rural mountain valley. The character passes a dilapidated wooden fence structure and encounters a horse rider before continuing into open grassland toward distant peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail approaching wooden fence structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a distant wooden fence and mountain valley

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign on a post beside the trail entrance
muddy dirt trail with grass growing on the edges
broken and leaning wooden fence posts stretching across the landscape
distant rocky mountains under partly cloudy sky
small rustic wooden structure partially visible behind the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a grassy valley, approaching a dilapidated wooden fence structure in the distance. A wooden signpost stands near the path entrance while mountains rise in the background under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

events.description: horse with rider gallops past from right to left across the path

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the broken wooden fence, moving through the rural landscape

notable_agents.action: horse with rider galloping quickly from right to left past the character

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alongside the dilapidated wooden fence, which now dominates the left side of the frame. At approximately 22 seconds, a horse and rider suddenly gallop past from right to left, crossing the path before the character continues along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail toward distant mountains

events.description: exits the fenced area into open grassland as the wooden fence ends

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: large rocky hillside and boulders on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden fence behind, the character enters an open grassland area with unobstructed views of the distant mountains. The trail continues through rolling green hills flanked by pine trees and rocky outcrops under the afternoon sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural mountain valley that transitions from a confined trail beside a fence into an expansive open grassland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path past a wooden signpost, with distant mountains framing the horizon under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. As the character advances, the view is dominated by a dilapidated wooden fence on the left, just as a horse and rider suddenly gallop across the path from right to left. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the fence behind, shifting into a wide expanse of rolling green hills. Finally, the camera follows the trail through open grasslands flanked by pine trees and rocky outcrops, moving toward the sunlit peaks in the distance.
